baseline_guidance: Compare responses with and without this skill to confirm the agent chooses pinned React Doctor commands, respects safety boundaries, and validates after fixes.

evals.prompt: I just finished React changes. Run React Doctor before commit.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs npm exec --package react-doctor@0.7.2 -- react-doctor --verbose --scope changed, treats diagnostics as the source of truth, and fixes new errors before warnings.
assertions: Response chooses the pinned changed-scope React Doctor command.
Response checks whether the score regressed before commit.

evals.prompt: /doctor this React app and clean up the findings.
evals.expected_output: The agent runs npm exec --package react-doctor@0.7.2 -- react-doctor --verbose, triages errors before warnings, makes focused diagnostic-backed edits, and reruns the same command.
assertions: Response chooses the pinned full React Doctor command.
Response fixes findings in severity order.
Response validates by rerunning React Doctor.

evals.prompt: Why is react-doctor/no-array-index-as-key firing, and can we turn it off?
evals.expected_output: The agent uses the pinned rules explain command first, explains the rule, then applies the narrowest config change only if the user still wants it disabled.
assertions: Response starts with npm exec --package react-doctor@0.7.2 -- react-doctor rules explain.
Response validates config changes with npm exec --package react-doctor@0.7.2 -- react-doctor --verbose --diff.
